title: Tensei Akujo no Kuro Rekishi OVA

synonyms: The Dark History of the Reincarnated Villainess Episode 13
Yomi to Shitto to Tanjoubi/ Iana to Sol Netsuppoi Tsuitachi
alternative_titles.en: The Dark History of the Reincarnated Villainess: Yomi, Jealousy, and a Birthday / Iana and Sol's Feverish Day
alternative_titles.ja: 転生悪女の黒歴史 「ヨミと嫉妬と誕生日」「イアナとソル 熱っぽい一日」

synopsis: Bundled with the 18th volume of the manga. Covers the Yomi to Shitto to Tanjoubi (Yomi, Jealousy, and a Birthday) and Iana to Sol Netsuppoi Ichinichi (Iana and Sol's Feverish Day) story from the Short Story Collection.
